title: Recommendation: keep full traces for the next run
summary: Full traces are valuable for debugging, and the next demo should preserve them even if token usage rises.

claims.text: The candidate reduced unsupported claims with a modest token increase.
Finance allows some cost growth for demo-quality evals.
Reviewers find traces useful for debugging.

openQuestions: How much trace detail is enough?
recommendation: Keep full traces for all cases and revisit cost after the demo.
